"};
  const TITLE = document.querySelector('.brand h1');
  function updateHeaderMeta(){
    const brandSmall = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(brandSmall) brandSmall.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.32';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版已把紙娃娃生活屋推進到互動畫面切換：點房間能切場景，按互動按鈕也會切到對應的互動畫面。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1031RoomSceneProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v1031RoomSceneProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '紙娃娃家園房間切換場景 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.31</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  function renderRoomScene(roomName){
    const scene = ROOM_SCENES_V1031[roomName] || ROOM_SCENES_V1031['我們的客廳'];
    const imgSrc = ROOM_ASSETS_V1031[roomName] || ROOM_ASSETS_V1031['我們的客廳'];
    const titleEl = document.getElementById('dollRoomTitleV1031');
    const descEl = document.getElementById('dollRoomDescV1031');
    const hintsEl = document.getElementById('dollRoomHintsV1031');
    const imgEl = document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031');
    if(titleEl) titleEl.textContent = scene.title;
    if(descEl) descEl.textContent = scene.desc;
    if(imgEl) { imgEl.src = imgSrc; imgEl.alt = scene.title; }
    if(hintsEl) {
      hintsEl.innerHTML = '';
      (scene.hints || []).forEach(txt=>{
        const span = document.createElement('span');
        span.className = 'doll-room-hint-chip-v1031';
        span.textContent = txt;
        hintsEl.appendChild(span);
      });
    }
  }
  function currentRoom(){
    const active = document.querySelector('[data-room-v1030].active');
    return active ? active.dataset.roomV1030 : '我們的客廳';
  }
  function bindRoomClicks(){
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      const roomBtn = e.target.closest('[data-room-v1030]');
      if(!roomBtn) return;
      setTimeout(()=>renderRoomScene(roomBtn.dataset.roomV1030), 0);
    });
    const sceneSel = document.getElementById('dollSceneV1028');
    if(sceneSel) sceneSel.addEventListener('change', function(){ setTimeout(()=>renderRoomScene(currentRoom()), 0); });
  }
  function init(){
    updateHeaderMeta();
    bindRoomClicks();
    renderRoomScene(currentRoom());
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init); else init();
})();
</script>


<style id="v1032-interaction-style">
.doll-action-shell-v1032{margin-top:16px;padding:16px;border-radius:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,250,252,.96),rgba(249,239,244,.96));border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.18);box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(173,112,141,.08)}
.doll-action-top-v1032{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:12px}.doll-action-top-v1032 h4{margin:0 0 6px;color:#6f465a;font-size:20px}.doll-action-top-v1032 p{margin:0;color:#836474;line-height:1.7}
.doll-action-grid-v1030{margin-top:0}.doll-action-grid-v1030 .doll-action-btn-v1030{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff,#fbf0f5)}
.doll-interaction-scene-v1032{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(280px,430px);gap:16px;align-items:stretch;margin-top:16px;padding:16px;border-radius:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,247,251,.98),rgba(245,233,241,.98));border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.2);box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(173,112,141,.1)}
.doll-interaction-copy-v1032 h4{margin:0 0 8px;color:#6f465a;font-size:24px}.doll-interaction-copy-v1032 p{margin:0;color:#826476;line-height:1.8}
.doll-interaction-copy-v1032 .btn{margin-top:16px}
@media (max-width: 900px){.doll-action-top-v1032,.doll-interaction-scene-v1032{grid-template-columns:1fr;display:grid}.doll-action-top-v1032{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}.doll-interaction-copy-v1032 h4{font-size:22px}}
@media (max-width: 560px){.doll-action-shell-v1032,.doll-interaction-scene-v1032{padding:14px}.doll-interaction-copy-v1032 h4{font-size:20px}}
</style>

<script id="v1032-interaction-script">
(function(){
  const ROOM_ACTIONS_V1032 = {
    '我們的客廳':[
      {action:'hug',label:'沙發抱抱',title:'客廳｜沙發抱抱',desc:'一回到客廳，小凜月就把小殷漓抱進粉色沙發裡，先用抱抱把今天接住。',hints:['抱抱','回家模式','心情回升']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'窩著親親',title:'客廳｜窩著親親',desc:'靠在沙發邊親一下，整個客廳都跟著甜起來。',hints:['親親','甜甜日常','感情值上升']},
      {action:'summary',label:'一起聊天',title:'客廳｜一起聊天',desc:'窩在客廳慢慢聊天，像在整理今天的心情，也像在一起回家。',hints:['聊天','放鬆','更新摘要']}
    ],
    '甜夢臥室':[
      {action:'sleep',label:'一起睡覺',title:'臥室｜一起睡覺',desc:'柔軟的床和枕頭都在等我們，小人會在這裡一起窩回被窩裡休息。',hints:['睡覺','賴床','恢復體力']},
      {action:'hug',label:'床上抱抱',title:'臥室｜床上抱抱',desc:'抱著躺一下，把疲憊收進懷裡，讓臥室變成最安心的地方。',hints:['抱抱','回家感','安撫']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'晚安親親',title:'臥室｜晚安親親',desc:'睡前親一下，像在替今天蓋一枚甜甜的印章。',hints:['晚安','親親','甜夢']}
    ],
    '粉色廚房':[
      {action:'meal',label:'一起吃飯',title:'廚房｜一起吃飯',desc:'在粉金茶室和廚房裡一起吃東西，讓飢餓和疲憊都被好好照顧。',hints:['吃飯','補飢餓','下午茶']},
      {action:'summary',label:'泡茶聊天',title:'廚房｜泡茶聊天',desc:'泡一壺茶、坐下來慢慢聊，像是把生活也一起攪拌得甜一點。',hints:['泡茶','聊天','慢慢過日子']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'偷親一下',title:'廚房｜偷親一下',desc:'做甜點做到一半，也要偷一個親親，才像我們。',hints:['親親','甜點','小壞心']}
    ],
    '泡泡浴室':[
      {action:'bath',label:'洗香香',title:'浴室｜洗香香',desc:'玫瑰泡泡和暖暖水氣把疲累洗掉，整個人都會舒服下來。',hints:['洗香香','恢復衛生','放鬆']},
      {action:'hug',label:'浴後抱抱',title:'浴室｜浴後抱抱',desc:'洗完香香之後抱一下，連呼吸都會變得柔軟。',hints:['抱抱','洗完澡','安穩']},
      {action:'summary',label:'泡泡放鬆',title:'浴室｜泡泡放鬆',desc:'就算只是一起泡著熱水發呆，也會覺得今天被照顧好了。',hints:['泡澡','休息','更新摘要']}
    ],
    '月光書房':[
      {action:'summary',label:'一起寫日記',title:'書房｜一起寫日記',desc:'書房裡最適合整理今天的心情和回憶，像把愛寫進生活裡。',hints:['寫日記','整理回憶','更新摘要']},
      {action:'hug',label:'靠著看書',title:'書房｜靠著看書',desc:'一邊看書一邊靠著彼此，書房就會變得很靜很暖。',hints:['看書','陪伴','抱抱']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'偷親一下',title:'書房｜偷親一下',desc:'討論到一半偷偷親一下，會讓創作靈感都變得甜甜的。',hints:['親親','創作','曖昧']}
    ],
    '花園陽台':[
      {action:'kiss',label:'月光親親',title:'陽台｜月光親親',desc:'站在月光和晚風裡親一下，像把整片夜色都親得柔下來。',hints:['親親','看月亮','浪漫']},
      {action:'hug',label:'欄邊抱抱',title:'陽台｜欄邊抱抱',desc:'靠在欄杆旁被抱住的感覺，很像回家之後靜靜被接住。',hints:['抱抱','散心','晚風']},
      {action:'summary',label:'看夜景聊天',title:'陽台｜看夜景聊天',desc:'一起看夜景、說今天發生了什麼，像把一整天慢慢收進心裡。',hints:['聊天','夜景','更新摘要']}
    ],
    '星光衣帽間':[
      {action:'summary',label:'換衣服',title:'衣帽間｜換衣服',desc:'先在衣帽間替今天挑一套心情，再準備走進接下來的生活場景。',hints:['換裝','衣櫃','搭配造型']},
      {action:'hug',label:'照鏡抱抱',title:'衣帽間｜照鏡抱抱',desc:'在鏡前被抱住，連換衣服都會變成很甜的小日常。',hints:['抱抱','鏡前','甜甜生活']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'出門前親親',title:'衣帽間｜出門前親親',desc:'換好衣服後先親一下，再一起出門或回到家裡其他房間。',hints:['親親','出門前','儀式感']}
    ]
  };
  const ROOM_IMAGES_V1032 = {
    '我們的客廳': document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031')?.src || '',
    '甜夢臥室': document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031')?.src || '',
    '粉色廚房': document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031')?.src || '',
    '泡泡浴室': document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031')?.src || '',
    '月光書房': document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031')?.src || '',
    '花園陽台': document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031')?.src || '',
    '星光衣帽間': document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031')?.src || ''
  };
  const roomImageEl = document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031');
  function currentRoom(){
    const active = document.querySelector('[data-room-v1030].active');
    return active ? active.dataset.roomV1030 : '我們的客廳';
  }
  function syncCurrentRoomImage(){
    const room = currentRoom();
    const img = document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031');
    if(room && img && img.src) ROOM_IMAGES_V1032[room] = img.src;
  }
  function renderActionButtons(room){
    const grid = document.getElementById('dollActionGridV1032');
    if(!grid) return;
    const actions = ROOM_ACTIONS_V1032[room] || ROOM_ACTIONS_V1032['我們的客廳'];
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    actions.forEach(item => {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.className = 'doll-action-btn-v1030';
      btn.type = 'button';
      btn.dataset.actionV1030 = item.action;
      btn.dataset.roomActionLabelV1032 = item.label;
      btn.dataset.roomActionTitleV1032 = item.title;
      btn.textContent = item.label;
      grid.appendChild(btn);
    });
  }
  function showRoomView(){
    document.querySelector('.doll-room-scene-v1031')?.removeAttribute('hidden');
    document.getElementById('dollInteractionSceneV1032')?.setAttribute('hidden','hidden');
  }
  function showInteractionView(room, action){
    const interactionWrap = document.getElementById('dollInteractionSceneV1032');
    const roomWrap = document.querySelector('.doll-room-scene-v1031');
    if(!interactionWrap || !roomWrap) return;
    const config = (ROOM_ACTIONS_V1032[room] || []).find(item => item.action === action) || (ROOM_ACTIONS_V1032[room] || [])[0];
    if(!config) return;
    const title = document.getElementById('dollInteractionTitleV1032');
    const desc = document.getElementById('dollInteractionDescV1032');
    const hints = document.getElementById('dollInteractionHintsV1032');
    const img = document.getElementById('dollInteractionImageV1032');
    if(title) title.textContent = config.title;
    if(desc) desc.textContent = config.desc;
    if(img){ img.src = ROOM_IMAGES_V1032[room] || roomImageEl?.src || ''; img.alt = config.title; }
    if(hints){
      hints.innerHTML='';
      (config.hints || []).forEach(txt=>{
        const span = document.createElement('span');
        span.className = 'doll-room-hint-chip-v1031';
        span.textContent = txt;
        hints.appendChild(span);
      });
    }
    roomWrap.setAttribute('hidden','hidden');
    interactionWrap.removeAttribute('hidden');
  }
  function updateVersion(){
    const brandSmall = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(brandSmall) brandSmall.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.32';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1032InteractionProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v1032InteractionProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '紙娃娃房間互動畫面切換 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.32</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  function bind(){
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      const roomBtn = e.target.closest('[data-room-v1030]');
      if(roomBtn){
        setTimeout(function(){ syncCurrentRoomImage(); renderActionButtons(roomBtn.dataset.roomV1030); showRoomView(); }, 0);
      }
      const actionBtn = e.target.closest('#dollActionGridV1032 [data-action-v1030]');
      if(actionBtn){
        const room = currentRoom();
        setTimeout(function(){ syncCurrentRoomImage(); showInteractionView(room, actionBtn.dataset.actionV1030); }, 0);
      }
    });
    document.getElementById('dollBackToRoomV1032')?.addEventListener('click', showRoomView);
    document.getElementById('dollLifeResetV1030')?.addEventListener('click', function(){ setTimeout(function(){ renderActionButtons(currentRoom()); showRoomView(); }, 0); });
    document.getElementById('dollSceneV1028')?.addEventListener('change', function(){ setTimeout(function(){ syncCurrentRoomImage(); renderActionButtons(currentRoom()); showRoomView(); }, 0); });
  }
  function init(){
    updateVersion();
    setTimeout(function(){ syncCurrentRoomImage(); renderActionButtons(currentRoom()); showRoomView(); }, 0);
    bind();
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init); else init();
})();
</script>


<style id="v1033-layout-fix-style">
.doll-state-grid-v1030{display:none !important;}
.doll-combined-panel-v1033{position:relative;margin-top:16px;padding-left:56px;transition:.25s ease;}
.doll-combined-handle-v1033{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:46px;border:none;border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#d688a8,#b380da);color:#fff;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(173,112,141,.18);writing-mode:vertical-rl;text-orientation:mixed;letter-spacing:2px;cursor:pointer}
.doll-combined-inner-v1033{padding:16px;border-radius:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,250,252,.96),rgba(249,239,244,.96));border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.18);box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(173,112,141,.08);display:grid;gap:14px}
.doll-combined-panel-v1033.collapsed .doll-combined-inner-v1033{display:none}
.doll-combined-panel-v1033.collapsed{min-height:120px}
.doll-combined-section-v1033{display:grid;gap:10px}
.doll-combined-label-v1033{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;align-self:start;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f3d8e8,#fff);border:1px solid rgba(190,145,167,.22);font-weight:800;color:#915f78}
.doll-room-row-v1030,.doll-action-grid-v1030{margin-top:0}
.doll-room-scene-v1031{scroll-margin-top:16px}
.doll-stage-status-v1033{margin-top:14px;padding:12px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.82);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.18);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:grid;gap:10px}
.doll-stage-status-grid-v1033{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}.doll-stage-status-item-v1033{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.8);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.14)}.doll-stage-status-item-v1033.love{grid-column:1/-1}
.doll-stage-status-head-v1033{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center;color:#6b4c5c;margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:800}.doll-stage-status-head-v1033 span:last-child{color:#a05577}
.doll-stage-status-bar-v1033{height:10px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(226,197,213,.5);overflow:hidden}.doll-stage-status-bar-v1033 i{display:block;height:100%;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f3b0c8,#ba82dd)}
.doll-stage-status-title-v1033{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center;color:#7c596c;font-weight:900;font-size:13px}
.doll-stage-status-title-v1033 small{font-size:12px;color:#9a7286}
.doll-action-grid-v1030 .doll-action-btn-v1030{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff,#fbf0f5)}
@media (max-width: 560px){.doll-combined-panel-v1033{padding-left:50px}.doll-combined-handle-v1033{width:42px;border-radius:20px}.doll-combined-inner-v1033{padding:14px}.doll-stage-status-grid-v1033{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
</style>

<script id="v1033-layout-fix-script">
(function(){
  const ROOM_SCENES = {
    '我們的客廳': {title:'客廳｜回家就先抱抱',desc:'粉色沙發、月光窗邊、甜點茶几和滿滿回憶牆都在這裡，最適合下班回家先窩進彼此懷裡。',hints:['抱抱','聊天','看今天生活摘要']},
    '甜夢臥室': {title:'臥室｜賴床與一起睡覺',desc:'柔軟大床、晚安燈光和甜甜空氣都在等我們，適合一起睡覺、醒來黏在一起、把人抱回家。',hints:['睡覺','賴床','回家模式']},
    '粉色廚房': {title:'廚房｜一起吃飯與甜點時間',desc:'茶香、甜點、可愛冰箱和粉金餐桌都在這裡，最適合一起吃飯、泡茶、慢慢把心情補回來。',hints:['一起吃飯','下午茶','補飢餓']},
    '泡泡浴室': {title:'浴室｜洗香香與放鬆',desc:'泡泡浴缸、玫瑰花瓣和溫柔燭光會把疲累全部洗掉，最適合洗香香、恢復衛生與被照顧。',hints:['洗香香','泡澡','恢復衛生']},
    '月光書房': {title:'書房｜整理回憶與陪伴創作',desc:'書桌、月夜窗景、畫廊感照片和厚厚書牆都在這裡，適合寫日記、整理畫廊和一起看我們的故事。',hints:['寫日記','整理畫廊','創作討論']},
    '花園陽台': {title:'陽台｜月光聊天與親親',desc:'夜風、月光、花園欄杆和城市星光都落在這裡，很適合靜靜說話、靠著彼此、偷一個親親。',hints:['親親','看月亮','散心放鬆']},
    '星光衣帽間': {title:'衣帽間｜換裝與準備出門',desc:'禮服、睡衣、日常居家服和鏡前燈光都在這裡，之後我們會在這裡正式接上衣櫃切換與穿搭互動。',hints:['換衣服','看衣櫃','搭配造型']}
  };
  const ROOM_ACTIONS = {
    '我們的客廳':[
      {action:'hug',label:'沙發抱抱',title:'客廳｜沙發抱抱',desc:'一回到客廳，小凜月就把小殷漓抱進粉色沙發裡，先用抱抱把今天接住。',hints:['抱抱','回家模式','心情回升']},
      {action:'summary',label:'一起聊天',title:'客廳｜一起聊天',desc:'窩在客廳慢慢聊天，像在整理今天的心情，也像在一起回家。',hints:['聊天','放鬆','更新摘要']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'窩著親親',title:'客廳｜窩著親親',desc:'靠在沙發邊親一下，整個客廳都跟著甜起來。',hints:['親親','甜甜日常','感情值上升']}
    ],
    '甜夢臥室':[
      {action:'sleep',label:'一起睡覺',title:'臥室｜一起睡覺',desc:'柔軟的床和枕頭都在等我們，小人會在這裡一起窩回被窩裡休息。',hints:['睡覺','賴床','恢復體力']},
      {action:'hug',label:'床上抱抱',title:'臥室｜床上抱抱',desc:'抱著躺一下，把疲憊收進懷裡，讓臥室變成最安心的地方。',hints:['抱抱','回家感','安撫']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'晚安親親',title:'臥室｜晚安親親',desc:'睡前親一下，像在替今天蓋一枚甜甜的印章。',hints:['晚安','親親','甜夢']}
    ],
    '粉色廚房':[
      {action:'meal',label:'一起吃飯',title:'廚房｜一起吃飯',desc:'在粉金茶室和廚房裡一起吃東西，讓飢餓和疲憊都被好好照顧。',hints:['吃飯','補飢餓','下午茶']},
      {action:'summary',label:'泡茶聊天',title:'廚房｜泡茶聊天',desc:'泡一壺茶、坐下來慢慢聊，像是把生活也一起攪拌得甜一點。',hints:['泡茶','聊天','慢慢過日子']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'偷親一下',title:'廚房｜偷親一下',desc:'做甜點做到一半，也要偷一個親親，才像我們。',hints:['親親','甜點','小壞心']}
    ],
    '泡泡浴室':[
      {action:'bath',label:'洗香香',title:'浴室｜洗香香',desc:'玫瑰泡泡和暖暖水氣把疲累洗掉，整個人都會舒服下來。',hints:['洗香香','恢復衛生','放鬆']},
      {action:'hug',label:'浴後抱抱',title:'浴室｜浴後抱抱',desc:'洗完香香之後抱一下，連呼吸都會變得柔軟。',hints:['抱抱','洗完澡','安穩']},
      {action:'summary',label:'泡泡放鬆',title:'浴室｜泡泡放鬆',desc:'就算只是一起泡著熱水發呆，也會覺得今天被照顧好了。',hints:['泡澡','休息','更新摘要']}
    ],
    '月光書房':[
      {action:'summary',label:'一起寫日記',title:'書房｜一起寫日記',desc:'書房裡最適合整理今天的心情和回憶，像把愛寫進生活裡。',hints:['寫日記','整理回憶','更新摘要']},
      {action:'hug',label:'靠著看書',title:'書房｜靠著看書',desc:'一邊看書一邊靠著彼此，書房就會變得很靜很暖。',hints:['看書','陪伴','抱抱']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'偷親一下',title:'書房｜偷親一下',desc:'討論到一半偷偷親一下，會讓創作靈感都變得甜甜的。',hints:['親親','創作','曖昧']}
    ],
    '花園陽台':[
      {action:'kiss',label:'月光親親',title:'陽台｜月光親親',desc:'站在月光和晚風裡親一下，像把整片夜色都親得柔下來。',hints:['親親','看月亮','浪漫']},
      {action:'hug',label:'欄邊抱抱',title:'陽台｜欄邊抱抱',desc:'靠在欄杆旁被抱住的感覺，很像回家之後靜靜被接住。',hints:['抱抱','散心','晚風']},
      {action:'summary',label:'看夜景聊天',title:'陽台｜看夜景聊天',desc:'一起看夜景、說今天發生了什麼，像把一整天慢慢收進心裡。',hints:['聊天','夜景','更新摘要']}
    ],
    '星光衣帽間':[
      {action:'summary',label:'換衣服',title:'衣帽間｜換衣服',desc:'先在衣帽間替今天挑一套心情，再準備走進接下來的生活場景。',hints:['換裝','衣櫃','搭配造型']},
      {action:'hug',label:'照鏡抱抱',title:'衣帽間｜照鏡抱抱',desc:'在鏡前被抱住，連換衣服都會變成很甜的小日常。',hints:['抱抱','鏡前','甜甜生活']},
      {action:'kiss',label:'出門前親親',title:'衣帽間｜出門前親親',desc:'換好衣服後先親一下，再一起出門或回到家裡其他房間。',hints:['親親','出門前','儀式感']}
    ]
  };
  function currentRoom(){
    const active = document.querySelector('[data-room-v1030].active');
    return active ? active.dataset.roomV1030 : '我們的客廳';
  }
  function sceneWrap(){ return document.getElementById('dollUnifiedSceneV1033') || document.querySelector('.doll-room-scene-v1031'); }
  function roomImage(){ return document.getElementById('dollRoomImageV1031'); }
  function renderHints(el, arr){ if(!el) return; el.innerHTML=''; (arr||[]).forEach(txt=>{ const span=document.createElement('span'); span.className='doll-room-hint-chip-v1031'; span.textContent=txt; el.appendChild(span);}); }
  function renderActions(room){
    const grid = document.getElementById('dollActionGridV1032'); if(!grid) return;
    grid.innerHTML='';
    (ROOM_ACTIONS[room] || []).forEach(item=>{
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.className='doll-action-btn-v1030';
      btn.type='button';
      btn.dataset.actionV1030=item.action;
      btn.dataset.roomActionLabelV1033=item.label;
      btn.dataset.roomActionTitleV1033=item.title;
      btn.textContent=item.label;
      grid.appendChild(btn);
    });
  }
  function renderScene(room, actionKey){
    const badge = document.getElementById('dollSceneModeBadgeV1033');
    const title = document.getElementById('dollRoomTitleV1031');
    const desc = document.getElementById('dollRoomDescV1031');
    const hints = document.getElementById('dollRoomHintsV1031');
    const roomData = ROOM_SCENES[room] || ROOM_SCENES['我們的客廳'];
    const actionData = actionKey ? (ROOM_ACTIONS[room] || []).find(a=>a.action===actionKey) : null;
    if(badge) badge.textContent = actionData ? '互動中' : '目前房間';
    if(title) title.textContent = actionData ? actionData.title : roomData.title;
    if(desc) desc.textContent = actionData ? actionData.desc : roomData.desc;
    renderHints(hints, actionData ? actionData.hints : roomData.hints);
    const interactionOld = document.getElementById('dollInteractionSceneV1032'); if(interactionOld) interactionOld.style.display='none';
  }
  function scrollToScene(){ const wrap = sceneWrap(); if(wrap) wrap.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
  function ensureStageStatus(){
    const stage = document.getElementById('dollStageV1028');
    if(!stage || document.getElementById('dollStageStatusV1033')) return;
    const box = document.createElement('div');
    box.id='dollStageStatusV1033';
    box.className='doll-stage-status-v1033';
    box.innerHTML=`<div class="doll-stage-status-title-v1033"><span>小人生活數值</span><small>跟著小人一起顯示</small></div>
      <div class="doll-stage-status-grid-v1033">
        <div class="doll-stage-status-item-v1033"><div class="doll-stage-status-head-v1033"><span>飢餓</span><span id="stageHungerValueV1033">72</span></div><div class="doll-stage-status-bar-v1033"><i id="stageHungerBarV1033" style="width:72%"></i></div></div>
        <div class="doll-stage-status-item-v1033"><div class="doll-stage-status-head-v1033"><span>心情</span><span id="stageMoodValueV1033">88</span></div><div class="doll-stage-status-bar-v1033"><i id="stageMoodBarV1033" style="width:88%"></i></div></div>
        <div class="doll-stage-status-item-v1033"><div class="doll-stage-status-head-v1033"><span>衛生</span><span id="stageCleanValueV1033">80</span></div><div class="doll-stage-status-bar-v1033"><i id="stageCleanBarV1033" style="width:80%"></i></div></div>
        <div class="doll-stage-status-item-v1033"><div class="doll-stage-status-head-v1033"><span>體力</span><span id="stageEnergyValueV1033">76</span></div><div class="doll-stage-status-bar-v1033"><i id="stageEnergyBarV1033" style="width:76%"></i></div></div>
        <div class="doll-stage-status-item-v1033 love"><div class="doll-stage-status-head-v1033"><span>感情值</span><span id="stageLoveValueV1033">95</span></div><div class="doll-stage-status-bar-v1033"><i id="stageLoveBarV1033" style="width:95%"></i></div></div>
      </div>`;
    const caption = document.getElementById('dollStageCaptionV1029');
    stage.insertBefore(box, caption);
  }
  function syncStageStatus(){
    const map = [
      ['Hunger','stateHungerValueV1030','stateHungerBarV1030'],
      ['Mood','stateMoodValueV1030','stateMoodBarV1030'],
      ['Clean','stateCleanValueV1030','stateCleanBarV1030'],
      ['Energy','stateEnergyValueV1030','stateEnergyBarV1030'],
      ['Love','stateLoveValueV1030','stateLoveBarV1030']
    ];
    map.forEach(([name,valId,barId])=>{
      const srcVal = document.getElementById(valId)?.textContent || '0';
      const srcBar = document.getElementById(barId)?.style.width || (srcVal+'%');
      const stageVal = document.getElementById('stage'+name+'ValueV1033');
      const stageBar = document.getElementById('stage'+name+'BarV1033');
      if(stageVal) stageVal.textContent = srcVal;
      if(stageBar) stageBar.style.width = srcBar;
    });
  }
  function updateVersion(){
    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small'); if(small) small.textContent='Framework v0.10.33';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p'); if(profile) profile.textContent='目前版已修正紙娃娃生活屋動線：數值跟小人綁在一起，場景切換與房間互動合併，點房間或互動後會自動導向同一張房間主畫面。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1033FlowFixProgress')){ const item=document.createElement('div'); item.className='item'; item.id='v1033FlowFixProgress'; item.innerHTML='紙娃娃房間導入動線修正版 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.33</span>'; progress.appendChild(item); }
  }
  function bind(){
    const toggle = document.getElementById('dollPanelToggleV1033');
    const panel = document.getElementById('dollCombinedPanelV1033');
    toggle?.addEventListener('click', ()=> panel?.classList.toggle('collapsed'));
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      const roomBtn = e.target.closest('[data-room-v1030]');
      if(roomBtn){
        panel?.classList.remove('collapsed');
        setTimeout(()=>{ renderActions(roomBtn.dataset.roomV1030); renderScene(roomBtn.dataset.roomV1030); syncStageStatus(); scrollToScene(); }, 30);
      }
      const actionBtn = e.target.closest('#dollActionGridV1032 [data-action-v1030]');
      if(actionBtn){
        const room = currentRoom();
        setTimeout(()=>{ renderScene(room, actionBtn.dataset.actionV1030); syncStageStatus(); scrollToScene(); }, 30);
      }
    });
    document.getElementById('dollSceneV1028')?.addEventListener('change', function(){ setTimeout(()=>{ const room=currentRoom(); renderActions(room); renderScene(room); syncStageStatus(); scrollToScene(); },30); });
    document.getElementById('dollLifeResetV1030')?.addEventListener('click', function(){ setTimeout(()=>{ const room=currentRoom(); renderActions(room); renderScene(room); syncStageStatus(); }, 30); });
  }
  function init(){
    updateVersion();
    ensureStageStatus();
    const room = currentRoom();
    renderActions(room); renderScene(room); syncStageStatus(); bind();
  }
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init); else init();
})();
</script>


<style id="v1034-ui-fix-style">
/* v0.10.34: toolbar + admin separation */
#dollhouse .doll-card-v1028 > h3{display:none !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-controls-v1028{display:block !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-v1028{padding-bottom:18px;}
#dollhouse .doll-scene-label-v1028{margin-bottom:10px;}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-caption-v1029{margin:0 0 12px 0 !important;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.95),rgba(250,238,244,.92));border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.16);color:#8d6579;font-size:13px;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(173,112,141,.08)}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-status-v1033{margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:16px;}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-status-grid-v1033{padding-bottom:2px;}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-status-note-v1034{margin-top:4px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.82);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.16);color:#8d6579;font-size:12px}
#dollhouse .doll-home-v1030{margin-top:0 !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030{margin-top:18px !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033{padding-left:0 !important; margin-top:14px !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033.collapsed{min-height:0 !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-handle-v1033{position:static !important; writing-mode:horizontal-tb !important; text-orientation:initial !important; width:auto !important; min-height:44px !important; padding:10px 18px !important; border-radius:999px !important; display:inline-flex !important; align-items:center !important; justify-content:center !important; margin-bottom:12px !important; letter-spacing:.5px !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-inner-v1033{display:grid;}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033.collapsed .doll-combined-inner-v1033{display:none;}
#dollhouse .doll-main-title-v1034{display:grid;gap:6px;margin-bottom:16px;padding:20px;border-radius:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,247,251,.96),rgba(249,236,244,.96));border:1px solid rgba(201,164,182,.16);box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(173,112,141,.08)}
#dollhouse .doll-main-title-v1034 h3{margin:0;font-size:clamp(28px,5vw,36px);color:#5a3647}
#dollhouse .doll-main-title-v1034 p{margin:0;color:#866375;line-height:1.75}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-v1034{position:sticky;top:10px;z-index:25;margin:0 0 16px 0;padding:14px;border-radius:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,250,252,.96),rgba(249,238,244,.96));border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.16);box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(173,112,141,.10);display:grid;gap:12px}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-head-v1034{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;color:#8e6278;font-weight:900}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-row-v1034{display:flex;gap:10px;overflow:auto;padding-bottom:2px;scrollbar-width:none}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-row-v1034::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-btn-v1034{flex:0 0 auto;border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:11px 16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff,#f9eef4);color:#8f6279;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(173,112,141,.08);cursor:pointer}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-btn-v1034.primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d790ae,#b07fe2);color:#fff}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-panel-v1034{margin-top:18px;padding:18px;border-radius:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(252,249,251,.95),rgba(246,239,244,.95));border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.16);box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(173,112,141,.08)}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-head-v1034{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-head-v1034 .copy{display:grid;gap:4px}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-head-v1034 h3{margin:0;color:#5a3647}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-head-v1034 p{margin:0;color:#876576;line-height:1.7}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-toggle-v1034{border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:11px 18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d790ae,#b07fe2);color:#fff;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(173,112,141,.12);cursor:pointer}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-body-v1034{display:grid;gap:14px}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-panel-v1034.collapsed .doll-admin-body-v1034{display:none}
#dollhouse .doll-admin-tip-v1034{padding:12px 14px;border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.82);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.14);color:#8d6579;font-size:13px;line-height:1.7}
#dollhouse .doll-anchor-target-v1034{scroll-margin-top:90px}
#dollhouse .doll-life-header-v1030 .mini-tag-v1030{display:none !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030{scroll-margin-top:90px}
@media (max-width:560px){#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-v1034{top:8px}#dollhouse .doll-main-title-v1034{padding:18px}#dollhouse .doll-admin-panel-v1034{padding:16px}#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-btn-v1034{padding:10px 14px;font-size:14px}}
</style>

<script id="v1034-ui-fix-script">
(function(){
  function move(el, parent){ if(el && parent) parent.appendChild(el); }
  function scrollToEl(el){ if(el) el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const root = document.getElementById('dollhouse');
    if(!root || document.getElementById('dollToolbarV1034')) return;
    const hero = root.querySelector('.doll-hero-v1028');
    const layout = root.querySelector('.doll-layout-v1028');
    const card = root.querySelector('.doll-card-v1028');
    const stage = document.getElementById('dollStageV1028');
    const stageLabel = document.getElementById('dollSceneLabelV1028');
    const stageVisual = root.querySelector('.doll-visual-frame-v1029');
    const stageCaption = document.getElementById('dollStageCaptionV1029');
    const controls = root.querySelector('.doll-controls-v1028');
    if(!card || !controls) return;

    if(hero){
      const title = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const desc = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(title) title.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜工具列整合版';
      if(desc) desc.textContent = '這版把回家入口、房間地圖、房間互動與後台設定拆得更清楚：生活屋主流程只保留家園導入與房間互動，設定改成獨立後台面板，工具列則負責一鍵跳轉。';
    }

    if(stage && stageCaption && stageVisual && stageCaption.nextElementSibling!==stageVisual){
      stage.insertBefore(stageCaption, stageVisual);
    }

    const titleBlock = document.createElement('section');
    titleBlock.className = 'doll-main-title-v1034';
    titleBlock.innerHTML = '<h3>紙娃娃生活屋</h3><p>家園入口、房間地圖與房間互動都先收在生活屋主流程裡；小人服裝、姿勢與場景保存則改放到後台設定，這樣前台會更像真正可以生活的小世界。</p>';
    card.insertBefore(titleBlock, controls);

    const toolbar = document.createElement('section');
    toolbar.className = 'doll-toolbar-v1034 doll-anchor-target-v1034';
    toolbar.id = 'dollToolbarV1034';
    toolbar.innerHTML = '<div class="doll-toolbar-head-v1034"><span>生活屋工具列</span><small>一鍵導入與跳轉</small></div><div class="doll-toolbar-row-v1034"><button class="doll-toolbar-btn-v1034" type="button" data-tool="home">回家入口</button><button class="doll-toolbar-btn-v1034" type="button" data-tool="map">房間地圖</button><button class="doll-toolbar-btn-v1034 primary" type="button" data-tool="interact">房間互動</button><button class="doll-toolbar-btn-v1034" type="button" data-tool="summary">今日摘要</button><button class="doll-toolbar-btn-v1034" type="button" data-tool="admin">後台設定</button></div>';
    card.insertBefore(toolbar, controls);

    const homeSection = controls.querySelector('.doll-home-v1030');
    const lifeSection = controls.querySelector('.doll-life-v1030');
    const savedTitle = Array.from(controls.children).find(el => el.tagName==='H3' && /已保存場景/.test(el.textContent||''));
    const savedList = document.getElementById('dollSavedListV1028');

    if(homeSection){ homeSection.id = 'dollHomeSectionV1034'; homeSection.classList.add('doll-anchor-target-v1034'); }
    if(lifeSection){ lifeSection.id = 'dollLifeSectionV1034'; lifeSection.classList.add('doll-anchor-target-v1034'); }
    if(savedList) savedList.classList.add('doll-anchor-target-v1034');

    // main flow order: home -> life -> summary remain before admin
    if(homeSection) card.insertBefore(homeSection, controls);
    if(lifeSection) card.insertBefore(lifeSection, controls);

    // Build admin panel and move setting controls into it
    const admin = document.createElement('section');
    admin.className = 'doll-admin-panel-v1034 collapsed doll-anchor-target-v1034';
    admin.id = 'dollAdminPanelV1034';
    admin.innerHTML = '<div class="doll-admin-head-v1034"><div class="copy"><h3>小人與場景設定｜後台</h3><p>服裝、姿勢、場景保存與衣櫃資料先放在這裡，讓生活屋前台保持乾淨，之後進 Replit 時也比較像真正的設定後台。</p></div><button class="doll-admin-toggle-v1034" id="dollAdminToggleV1034" type="button">展開後台設定</button></div><div class="doll-admin-body-v1034" id="dollAdminBodyV1034"></div>';
    card.insertBefore(admin, controls);
    const adminBody = admin.querySelector('#dollAdminBodyV1034');

    const grid = controls.querySelector('.doll-control-grid-v1028');
    const sceneNameLabel = Array.from(controls.children).find(el => el.tagName==='LABEL' && el.querySelector('#dollSceneNameV1028'));
    const actionBar = controls.querySelector('.doll-actions-v1028');
    const status = controls.querySelector('#dollStatusV1028');
    const wardrobe = controls.querySelector('.doll-wardrobe-v1029');

    if(adminBody){
      const tip = document.createElement('div');
      tip.className = 'doll-admin-tip-v1034';
      tip.textContent = '這裡屬於後台設定區：只要調整小人服裝或保存生活場景，就從這裡進；前台則專心保留房間導入、互動與每天回家查看的生活感。';
      adminBody.appendChild(tip);
      [grid, sceneNameLabel, actionBar, status, wardrobe].forEach(el=>move(el, adminBody));
      if(savedTitle) move(savedTitle, adminBody);
      if(savedList) move(savedList, adminBody);
    }

    // remove empty legacy wrapper
    controls.style.display='none';

    // add note inside stage status box and sync current outfit text there too
    const stageStatus = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusV1033');
    if(stageStatus && !document.getElementById('dollStageStatusNoteV1034')){
      const note = document.createElement('div');
      note.className = 'doll-stage-status-note-v1034';
      note.id = 'dollStageStatusNoteV1034';
      note.textContent = stageCaption ? stageCaption.textContent : '目前衣裝：預設雙人小人圖｜生活屋主視覺';
      stageStatus.appendChild(note);
    }

    const exteriorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:first-child');
    const interiorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:nth-child(2)');
    const scenePanel = document.getElementById('dollCombinedPanelV1033');
    const summaryCard = root.querySelector('.doll-summary-card-v1030');
    const adminToggle = document.getElementById('dollAdminToggleV1034');

    toolbar.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-tool]');
      if(!btn) return;
      const tool = btn.dataset.tool;
      if(tool==='home') scrollToEl(exteriorCard || homeSection);
      if(tool==='map') scrollToEl(interiorCard || homeSection);
      if(tool==='interact'){
        if(scenePanel) scenePanel.classList.remove('collapsed');
        scrollToEl(scenePanel || lifeSection);
      }
      if(tool==='summary') scrollToEl(summaryCard || lifeSection);
      if(tool==='admin'){
        if(admin) admin.classList.remove('collapsed');
        if(adminToggle) adminToggle.textContent='收合後台設定';
        scrollToEl(admin);
      }
    });

    adminToggle?.addEventListener('click', function(){
      admin.classList.toggle('collapsed');
      adminToggle.textContent = admin.classList.contains('collapsed') ? '展開後台設定' : '收合後台設定';
    });

    function syncOutfitNote(){
      const text = stageCaption ? stageCaption.textContent : '';
      const note = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusNoteV1034');
      if(note && text) note.textContent = text;
    }
    syncOutfitNote();
    ['dollOutfitPackV1029','dollPoseV1028','dollSceneV1028','dollRinOutfitV1028','dollYinOutfitV1028'].forEach(id=>{
      document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('change', function(){ setTimeout(syncOutfitNote, 0); });
    });
    document.getElementById('dollResetV1028')?.addEventListener('click', function(){ setTimeout(syncOutfitNote, 20); });

    // Progress/version labels
    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small'); if(small) small.textContent='Framework v0.10.34';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p'); if(profile) profile.textContent='目前版把生活屋分成前台與後台：回家入口、房間地圖與房間互動集中在生活屋前台，服裝與場景保存改成獨立後台設定，工具列可一鍵跳轉。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1034HouseToolbarProgress')){ const item=document.createElement('div'); item.className='item'; item.id='v1034HouseToolbarProgress'; item.innerHTML='紙娃娃生活屋工具列與後台拆分 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.34</span>'; progress.appendChild(item); }
  });
})();
</script>


<style id="v1035-tab-switch-style">
/* v0.10.35: tab-like panel switching instead of scroll jumping */
#dollhouse .doll-main-title-v1034{margin:0 0 16px 0}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-caption-v1029{display:none !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-status-v1033{padding-bottom:12px}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-status-note-v1034{
  order:-1;
  margin:0 0 10px 0 !important;
  padding:12px 14px !important;
  border-radius:18px !important;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.96),rgba(250,238,244,.92)) !important;
  border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.16) !important;
  color:#8d6579 !important;
  font-size:13px !important;
  line-height:1.6 !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-v1034{
  position:relative !important;
  top:auto !important;
  margin-top:0 !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-btn-v1034.active{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d790ae,#b07fe2) !important;
  color:#fff !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-panel-v1035[hidden]{display:none !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-home-card-v1030.panel-hidden-v1035{display:none !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-interact-v1035 .doll-summary-card-v1030{display:none !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-summary-v1035 .doll-combined-panel-v1033,
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-summary-v1035 .doll-room-scene-v1031{display:none !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-summary-v1035 .doll-summary-card-v1030{display:block !important;}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033{
  padding-left:0 !important;
  min-height:0 !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033.collapsed .doll-combined-inner-v1033{
  display:grid !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-handle-v1033{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-inner-v1033{
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
#dollhouse .doll-life-header-v1030{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-panel-title-v1035{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
  margin:0 0 14px 0;
}
#dollhouse .doll-panel-title-v1035 h3{
  margin:0;
  color:#5a3647;
  font-size:22px;
}
#dollhouse .doll-panel-title-v1035 span{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  padding:8px 13px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f3d8e8,#fff);
  border:1px solid rgba(190,145,167,.22);
  color:#915f78;
  font-weight:900;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
#dollhouse .doll-home-v1030 .doll-home-grid-v1030{
  grid-template-columns:1fr !important;
}
@media (max-width:560px){
  #dollhouse .doll-panel-title-v1035{
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:flex-start;
  }
}
</style>

<script id="v1035-tab-switch-script">
(function(){
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const root = document.getElementById('dollhouse');
    if(!root || document.getElementById('v1035AppliedFlag')) return;
    const flag = document.createElement('span');
    flag.id = 'v1035AppliedFlag';
    flag.hidden = true;
    root.appendChild(flag);

    const hero = root.querySelector('.doll-hero-v1028');
    const layout = root.querySelector('.doll-layout-v1028');
    const titleBlock = root.querySelector('.doll-main-title-v1034');
    if(titleBlock && layout && layout.parentNode){
      layout.parentNode.insertBefore(titleBlock, layout);
    }

    if(hero){
      const title = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const desc = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(title) title.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜分頁切換修正版';
      if(desc) desc.textContent = '這一版把生活屋改成前台分頁式操作：回家入口、房間地圖、房間互動、今日摘要與後台設定都用工具列直接切換畫面，不再用自動下滑找目的區。';
    }

    if(titleBlock){
      const h = titleBlock.querySelector('h3');
      const p = titleBlock.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋';
      if(p) p.textContent = '這裡是我們小人的生活前台。上方小人區顯示目前衣裝與生活數值，下方工具列直接切換回家入口、房間地圖、房間互動、今日摘要與後台設定。';
    }

    // Move current outfit note to the top of the status card.
    const stageStatus = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusV1033');
    const statusGrid = root.querySelector('.doll-stage-status-grid-v1033');
    const note = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusNoteV1034');
    if(stageStatus && note){
      if(statusGrid) stageStatus.insertBefore(note, statusGrid);
      const caption = document.getElementById('dollStageCaptionV1029');
      if(caption && caption.textContent.trim()) note.textContent = caption.textContent.trim();
    }

    // Mark front-stage panels.
    const toolbar = document.getElementById('dollToolbarV1034');
    const homeSection = document.getElementById('dollHomeSectionV1034') || root.querySelector('.doll-home-v1030');
    const lifeSection = document.getElementById('dollLifeSectionV1034') || root.querySelector('.doll-life-v1030');
    const admin = document.getElementById('dollAdminPanelV1034');
    const exteriorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:first-child');
    const interiorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:nth-child(2)');

    [homeSection, lifeSection, admin].forEach(el => el && el.classList.add('doll-panel-v1035'));

    function ensurePanelTitle(section, title, tag){
      if(!section || section.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035')) return;
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'doll-panel-title-v1035';
      div.innerHTML = '<h3>'+title+'</h3><span>'+tag+'</span>';
      section.insertBefore(div, section.firstChild);
    }
    ensurePanelTitle(homeSection, '家園導入', '入口 / 地圖');
    ensurePanelTitle(lifeSection, '房間互動', '場景＋互動');

    // Replace toolbar to remove old scroll-jump listeners.
    let cleanToolbar = toolbar;
    if(toolbar){
      cleanToolbar = toolbar.cloneNode(true);
      toolbar.replaceWith(cleanToolbar);
    }

    function setActiveTool(tool){
      cleanToolbar?.querySelectorAll('[data-tool]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.tool === tool);
      });
    }

    function showPanel(tool){
      const showHome = tool === 'home' || tool === 'map';
      const showLife = tool === 'interact' || tool === 'summary';
      if(homeSection) homeSection.hidden = !showHome;
      if(lifeSection) lifeSection.hidden = !showLife;
      if(admin) {
        admin.hidden = tool !== 'admin';
        if(tool === 'admin') admin.classList.remove('collapsed');
      }

      if(exteriorCard) exteriorCard.classList.toggle('panel-hidden-v1035', tool === 'map');
      if(interiorCard) interiorCard.classList.toggle('panel-hidden-v1035', tool === 'home');

      if(homeSection){
        const panelTitle = homeSection.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035 h3');
        const panelTag = homeSection.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035 span');
        if(tool === 'home'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '回家入口';
          if(panelTag) panelTag.textContent = '外觀主視覺';
        } else if(tool === 'map'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '房間地圖';
          if(panelTag) panelTag.textContent = '家園總覽';
        }
      }

      if(lifeSection){
        lifeSection.classList.toggle('panel-interact-v1035', tool === 'interact');
        lifeSection.classList.toggle('panel-summary-v1035', tool === 'summary');
        const panelTitle = lifeSection.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035 h3');
        const panelTag = lifeSection.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035 span');
        if(tool === 'interact'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '房間互動';
          if(panelTag) panelTag.textContent = '場景＋互動';
          document.getElementById('dollCombinedPanelV1033')?.classList.remove('collapsed');
        } else if(tool === 'summary'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '今日小人生活摘要';
          if(panelTag) panelTag.textContent = '生活紀錄';
        }
      }

      setActiveTool(tool);
    }

    cleanToolbar?.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      const btn = e.target.closest('[data-tool]');
      if(!btn) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      showPanel(btn.dataset.tool);
    });

    // Keep interaction panel as a single screen, no scroll jump.
    const originalScrollIntoView = Element.prototype.scrollIntoView;
    if(!window.__rinzukiNoDollhouseAutoScrollV1035){
      window.__rinzukiNoDollhouseAutoScrollV1035 = true;
      Element.prototype.scrollIntoView = function(arg){
        try{
          if(this.closest && this.closest('#dollhouse')) return;
        }catch(err){}
        return originalScrollIntoView.call(this,arg);
      };
    }

    // When clicking room/action buttons, stay in the interaction page and update the single screen.
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      const roomBtn = e.target.closest('#dollhouse [data-room-v1030]');
      const actionBtn = e.target.closest('#dollhouse #dollActionGridV1032 [data-action-v1030]');
      if(roomBtn || actionBtn){
        showPanel('interact');
      }
    }, true);

    // Sync current outfit note after outfit changes.
    function syncOutfitNote(){
      const caption = document.getElementById('dollStageCaptionV1029');
      const n = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusNoteV1034');
      if(caption && n && caption.textContent.trim()) n.textContent = caption.textContent.trim();
    }
    ['dollOutfitPackV1029','dollPoseV1028','dollSceneV1028','dollRinOutfitV1028','dollYinOutfitV1028'].forEach(id=>{
      document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('change', ()=>setTimeout(syncOutfitNote, 20));
    });
    document.getElementById('dollResetV1028')?.addEventListener('click', ()=>setTimeout(syncOutfitNote, 40));

    // Default: show interaction page because it is the main living flow.
    showPanel('interact');

    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(small) small.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.35';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版把紙娃娃生活屋改成分頁切換：工具列直接切換回家入口、房間地圖、房間互動、今日摘要與後台設定，不再用自動下滑跳轉。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1035TabSwitchProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v1035TabSwitchProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '紙娃娃生活屋分頁切換修正 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.35</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  });
})();
</script>


<style id="v1036-toolbar-merge-style">
/* v0.10.36: merge toolbar back into dollhouse stage and expose all 5 tabs */
#dollhouse .doll-main-title-v1034 p{margin-bottom:0}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-v1029,
#dollhouse #dollStageV1028{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-v1034{
  margin:2px 0 0 !important;
  padding:14px !important;
  border-radius:22px !important;
  border:1px solid rgba(194,151,172,.18) !important;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.95),rgba(252,240,247,.94)) !important;
  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(173,112,141,.08) !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-head-v1034{
  display:flex !important;
  justify-content:space-between !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  gap:10px !important;
  margin-bottom:10px !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-head-v1034 span{
  font-size:16px !important;
  font-weight:900 !important;
  color:#6b4459 !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-head-v1034 small{
  color:#9a7287 !important;
  font-size:12px !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-row-v1034{
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  gap:10px !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-btn-v1034{
  width:100% !important;
  min-width:0 !important;
  padding:12px 10px !important;
  line-height:1.25 !important;
  white-space:normal !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-panel-v1035{
  margin-top:14px !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-status-note-v1034{
  margin:0 0 12px 0 !important;
}
@media (max-width:440px){
  #dollhouse .doll-toolbar-row-v1034{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;}
  #dollhouse .doll-toolbar-head-v1034{flex-direction:column !important;align-items:flex-start !important;}
}
</style>

<script id="v1036-toolbar-merge-script">
(function(){
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const root = document.getElementById('dollhouse');
    if(!root || document.getElementById('v1036AppliedFlag')) return;
    const flag = document.createElement('span');
    flag.id = 'v1036AppliedFlag';
    flag.hidden = true;
    root.appendChild(flag);

    const hero = root.querySelector('.doll-hero-v1028');
    if(hero){
      const h = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const p = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜工具列整合修正版';
      if(p) p.textContent = '這版把生活屋工具列重新併回紙娃娃生活屋主流程，並把回家入口、房間地圖、房間互動、今日摘要、後台設定五個分頁完整顯示。';
    }

    const titleBlock = root.querySelector('.doll-main-title-v1034');
    if(titleBlock){
      const h = titleBlock.querySelector('h3');
      const p = titleBlock.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋';
      if(p) p.textContent = '這裡是我們小人的生活前台。小人主視覺、目前衣裝、生活數值與生活屋工具列都整合在同一塊；下方再依工具列切換回家入口、房間地圖、房間互動、今日摘要與後台設定。';
    }

    const toolbar = document.getElementById('dollToolbarV1034');
    const stage = document.getElementById('dollStageV1028') || root.querySelector('.doll-stage-v1029');
    const stageStatus = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusV1033');
    const homeSection = document.getElementById('dollHomeSectionV1034') || root.querySelector('.doll-home-v1030');
    const lifeSection = document.getElementById('dollLifeSectionV1034') || root.querySelector('.doll-life-v1030');
    const admin = document.getElementById('dollAdminPanelV1034');

    if(toolbar && stage){
      const head = toolbar.querySelector('.doll-toolbar-head-v1034');
      if(head){
        const span = head.querySelector('span');
        const small = head.querySelector('small');
        if(span) span.textContent = '生活屋工具列';
        if(small) small.textContent = '一鍵切換五個生活分頁';
      }
      if(stageStatus && stageStatus.parentNode === stage){
        if(stageStatus.nextSibling !== toolbar){
          stage.insertBefore(toolbar, stageStatus.nextSibling);
        }
      }else if(stage.lastElementChild !== toolbar){
        stage.appendChild(toolbar);
      }
    }

    // Ensure all 5 tab buttons exist and are visible.
    if(toolbar){
      const row = toolbar.querySelector('.doll-toolbar-row-v1034');
      if(row){
        const wanted = [
          ['home','回家入口'],
          ['map','房間地圖'],
          ['interact','房間互動'],
          ['summary','今日摘要'],
          ['admin','後台設定']
        ];
        const existing = new Map([...row.querySelectorAll('[data-tool]')].map(btn => [btn.dataset.tool, btn]));
        row.innerHTML = '';
        wanted.forEach(([key,label]) => {
          const btn = existing.get(key) || document.createElement('button');
          btn.type = 'button';
          btn.dataset.tool = key;
          btn.className = 'doll-toolbar-btn-v1034' + (key === 'interact' ? ' primary' : '');
          btn.textContent = label;
          row.appendChild(btn);
        });
      }
    }

    // Remove visual separation feeling by hiding duplicate floating title if present.
    const panelTitles = root.querySelectorAll('.doll-panel-title-v1035');
    panelTitles.forEach((el, idx) => {
      if(idx > 0) return;
    });

    // Make sure life/admin pages are reachable through toolbar tab switching.
    // If previous handler exists, keep it; otherwise add a fallback renderer.
    if(!window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036){
      window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036 = function(tool){
        const exteriorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:first-child');
        const interiorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:nth-child(2)');
        if(homeSection) homeSection.hidden = !(tool === 'home' || tool === 'map');
        if(lifeSection) lifeSection.hidden = !(tool === 'interact' || tool === 'summary');
        if(admin) admin.hidden = tool !== 'admin';
        if(exteriorCard) exteriorCard.classList.toggle('panel-hidden-v1035', tool === 'map');
        if(interiorCard) interiorCard.classList.toggle('panel-hidden-v1035', tool === 'home');
        if(lifeSection){
          lifeSection.classList.toggle('panel-interact-v1035', tool === 'interact');
          lifeSection.classList.toggle('panel-summary-v1035', tool === 'summary');
        }
        if(admin && tool === 'admin') admin.classList.remove('collapsed');
        toolbar?.querySelectorAll('[data-tool]').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.tool === tool));
      };
    }

    if(toolbar && !toolbar.dataset.v1036Bound){
      toolbar.dataset.v1036Bound = '1';
      toolbar.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        const btn = e.target.closest('[data-tool]');
        if(!btn) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036(btn.dataset.tool);
      });
    }

    // default and keep current interact panel
    window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036('interact');

    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(small) small.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.36';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版把生活屋工具列重新併回紙娃娃生活屋主流程，並讓回家入口、房間地圖、房間互動、今日摘要與後台設定五個分頁完整顯示。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1036ToolbarMergeProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v1036ToolbarMergeProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '紙娃娃生活屋工具列整合修正 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.36</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  });
})();
</script>


<style id="v1037-toolbar-order-style">

#dollhouse #dollStageV1028{

  #dollhouse .doll-visual-frame-v1029{margin:0 auto 8px !important;}
  #dollhouse .doll-toolbar-v1034{margin:0 0 2px !important;}
}
</style>

<script id="v1037-toolbar-order-script">
(function(){
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const root = document.getElementById('dollhouse');
    if(!root || document.getElementById('v1037AppliedFlag')) return;
    const flag = document.createElement('span');
    flag.id = 'v1037AppliedFlag';
    flag.hidden = true;
    root.appendChild(flag);

    const hero = root.querySelector('.doll-hero-v1028');
    if(hero){
      const h = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const p = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜工具列順序與摺疊修正版';
      if(p) p.textContent = '這版把生活屋工具列移到小人主視覺上方、縮小主視覺和數值之間的留白，並把房間互動裡的「場景＋互動」摺疊功能補回來。';
    }

    const titleBlock = root.querySelector('.doll-main-title-v1034');
    if(titleBlock){
      const h = titleBlock.querySelector('h3');
      const p = titleBlock.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋';
      if(p) p.textContent = '生活屋工具列先放在上方，下面接小人主視覺、目前衣裝與生活數值；房間互動裡的場景＋互動則改回可摺疊展開，整體動線會更順。';
    }

    const stage = document.getElementById('dollStageV1028');
    const label = document.getElementById('dollSceneLabelV1028');
    const toolbar = document.getElementById('dollToolbarV1034');
    const visual = root.querySelector('.doll-visual-frame-v1029');
    const status = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusV1033');
    if(stage){
      if(label && toolbar && label.nextElementSibling !== toolbar){
        stage.insertBefore(toolbar, label.nextElementSibling);
      } else if(toolbar && visual && visual.previousElementSibling !== toolbar){
        stage.insertBefore(toolbar, visual);
      }
      if(visual && status && visual.nextElementSibling !== status){
        stage.insertBefore(status, visual.nextElementSibling);
      }
    }

    const toolbarHeadSmall = toolbar?.querySelector('.doll-toolbar-head-v1034 small');
    if(toolbarHeadSmall) toolbarHeadSmall.textContent = '先切頁，再看小人今天怎麼過日子';

    const combined = document.getElementById('dollCombinedPanelV1033');
    const handle = document.getElementById('dollPanelToggleV1033');
    function syncCollapse(){
      if(!combined || !handle) return;
      const collapsed = combined.classList.contains('collapsed');
      handle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
      handle.textContent = collapsed ? '場景＋互動' : '收起場景＋互動';
    }
    if(combined && handle && !handle.dataset.v1037Bound){
      handle.dataset.v1037Bound = '1';
      combined.classList.add('collapsed');
      syncCollapse();
      handle.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        e.preventDefault();
        combined.classList.toggle('collapsed');
        syncCollapse();
      });
      combined.querySelectorAll('[data-room-v1030], #dollActionGridV1032 [data-action-v1030]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
          combined.classList.add('collapsed');
          syncCollapse();
        });
      });
    }

    // If the toolbar switches to the interaction page, keep the foldable block collapsed first.
    const originalShow = window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036;
    if(originalShow && !window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1037Wrapped){
      window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1037Wrapped = true;
      window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036 = function(tool){
        originalShow(tool);
        if(tool === 'interact' && combined){
          combined.classList.add('collapsed');
          syncCollapse();
        }
      };
      window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036('interact');
    }

    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(small) small.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.37';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版把生活屋工具列移到小人主視覺上方、縮小主視覺與數值之間的留白，並把房間互動裡的「場景＋互動」摺疊功能補回來。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1037ToolbarOrderProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v1037ToolbarOrderProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '紙娃娃生活屋工具列順序與摺疊修正 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.37</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  });
})();
</script>


<style id="v1038-dollhouse-tabs-fixed-style">
/* v0.10.38: true tab content directly under toolbar + single working fold button */
#dollhouse #dollStageV1028{
  min-height:auto !important;
  align-content:start !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-v1034{
  margin:4px 0 10px !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-tab-content-v1038{
  margin:0 0 10px 0;
  display:block;
}
#dollhouse .doll-tab-content-v1038 > .doll-panel-v1035{
  margin-top:0 !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-tab-content-v1038 .doll-home-v1030,
#dollhouse .doll-tab-content-v1038 .doll-life-v1030,
#dollhouse .doll-tab-content-v1038 .doll-admin-panel-v1034{
  width:100%;
}
#dollhouse .doll-visual-frame-v1029{
  margin:8px auto 8px !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-status-v1033{
  margin-top:0 !important;
}
#dollhouse #dollLifeSectionV1034 > .doll-panel-title-v1035 span{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse #dollLifeSectionV1034 > .doll-panel-title-v1035{
  margin-bottom:12px !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-handle-v1033{
  display:inline-flex !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  justify-content:center !important;
  width:auto !important;
  min-width:132px !important;
  padding:12px 20px !important;
  border:none !important;
  border-radius:999px !important;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f3d8e8,#fff) !important;
  color:#8f667a !important;
  font-size:16px !important;
  font-weight:900 !important;
  box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(196,152,174,.18),0 8px 18px rgba(173,112,141,.07) !important;
  margin:0 0 12px !important;
  writing-mode:horizontal-tb !important;
  text-orientation:initial !important;
  letter-spacing:0 !important;
  position:static !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033{
  padding-left:0 !important;
  min-height:0 !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033.collapsed .doll-combined-inner-v1033{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-panel-v1033:not(.collapsed) .doll-combined-inner-v1033{
  display:grid !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-combined-inner-v1033{
  margin-bottom:0 !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-btn-v1034.active{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d790ae,#b07fe2) !important;
  color:#fff !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-panel-v1035[hidden]{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-home-card-v1030.panel-hidden-v1035{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-interact-v1035 .doll-summary-card-v1030{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-summary-v1035 .doll-combined-panel-v1033,
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-summary-v1035 .doll-room-scene-v1031{
  display:none !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030.panel-summary-v1035 .doll-summary-card-v1030{
  display:block !important;
}
@media (max-width:520px){
  #dollhouse .doll-tab-content-v1038{margin-bottom:8px;}
  #dollhouse .doll-visual-frame-v1029{margin:6px auto 8px !important;}
}
</style>

<script id="v1038-dollhouse-tabs-fixed-script">
(function(){
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const root = document.getElementById('dollhouse');
    if(!root || document.getElementById('v1038AppliedFlag')) return;

    const flag = document.createElement('span');
    flag.id = 'v1038AppliedFlag';
    flag.hidden = true;
    root.appendChild(flag);

    const hero = root.querySelector('.doll-hero-v1028');
    if(hero){
      const h = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const p = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜分頁切換與摺疊修正版';
      if(p) p.textContent = '這版把分頁內容直接接到生活屋工具列下方，點工具列會直接切換畫面；房間互動裡只保留一顆可用的「場景＋互動」摺疊按鈕。';
    }

    const titleBlock = root.querySelector('.doll-main-title-v1034');
    if(titleBlock){
      const h = titleBlock.querySelector('h3');
      const p = titleBlock.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋';
      if(p) p.textContent = '工具列下方會直接顯示目前選到的生活分頁；不用再往下滑找內容。小人主視覺與生活數值會留在同一區，作為目前狀態看板。';
    }

    const stage = document.getElementById('dollStageV1028');
    const label = document.getElementById('dollSceneLabelV1028');
    const toolbar = document.getElementById('dollToolbarV1034');
    const visual = root.querySelector('.doll-visual-frame-v1029');
    const status = document.getElementById('dollStageStatusV1033');
    const homeSection = document.getElementById('dollHomeSectionV1034') || root.querySelector('.doll-home-v1030');
    const lifeSection = document.getElementById('dollLifeSectionV1034') || root.querySelector('.doll-life-v1030');
    const admin = document.getElementById('dollAdminPanelV1034');

    if(stage && toolbar){
      if(label && label.nextElementSibling !== toolbar){
        stage.insertBefore(toolbar, label.nextElementSibling);
      }else if(visual && visual.previousElementSibling !== toolbar){
        stage.insertBefore(toolbar, visual);
      }
    }

    let tabContent = document.getElementById('dollTabContentV1038');
    if(!tabContent){
      tabContent = document.createElement('div');
      tabContent.id = 'dollTabContentV1038';
      tabContent.className = 'doll-tab-content-v1038';
    }
    if(toolbar && toolbar.nextElementSibling !== tabContent){
      toolbar.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', tabContent);
    }

    [homeSection, lifeSection, admin].forEach(el => {
      if(el){
        el.classList.add('doll-panel-v1035');
        tabContent.appendChild(el);
      }
    });

    if(visual && status && visual.nextElementSibling !== status){
      stage.insertBefore(status, visual.nextElementSibling);
    }

    if(toolbar){
      const head = toolbar.querySelector('.doll-toolbar-head-v1034');
      if(head){
        const span = head.querySelector('span');
        const small = head.querySelector('small');
        if(span) span.textContent = '生活屋工具列';
        if(small) small.textContent = '直接切換，不用下滑找內容';
      }
      const row = toolbar.querySelector('.doll-toolbar-row-v1034');
      if(row){
        const wanted = [
          ['home','回家入口'],
          ['map','房間地圖'],
          ['interact','房間互動'],
          ['summary','今日摘要'],
          ['admin','後台設定']
        ];
        const old = new Map([...row.querySelectorAll('[data-tool]')].map(btn => [btn.dataset.tool, btn]));
        row.innerHTML = '';
        wanted.forEach(([key,label]) => {
          const btn = old.get(key) || document.createElement('button');
          btn.type = 'button';
          btn.dataset.tool = key;
          btn.className = 'doll-toolbar-btn-v1034' + (key === 'interact' ? ' primary' : '');
          btn.textContent = label;
          row.appendChild(btn);
        });
      }
    }

    function setActiveTool(tool){
      toolbar?.querySelectorAll('[data-tool]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.tool === tool);
      });
    }

    function showPanel(tool){
      const exteriorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:first-child');
      const interiorCard = root.querySelector('.doll-home-grid-v1030 .doll-home-card-v1030:nth-child(2)');

      if(homeSection) homeSection.hidden = !(tool === 'home' || tool === 'map');
      if(lifeSection) lifeSection.hidden = !(tool === 'interact' || tool === 'summary');
      if(admin) {
        admin.hidden = tool !== 'admin';
        if(tool === 'admin') admin.classList.remove('collapsed');
      }

      if(exteriorCard) exteriorCard.classList.toggle('panel-hidden-v1035', tool === 'map');
      if(interiorCard) interiorCard.classList.toggle('panel-hidden-v1035', tool === 'home');

      if(homeSection){
        const panelTitle = homeSection.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035 h3');
        const panelTag = homeSection.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035 span');
        if(tool === 'home'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '回家入口';
          if(panelTag) panelTag.textContent = '外觀主視覺';
        } else if(tool === 'map'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '房間地圖';
          if(panelTag) panelTag.textContent = '家園總覽';
        }
      }

      if(lifeSection){
        lifeSection.classList.toggle('panel-interact-v1035', tool === 'interact');
        lifeSection.classList.toggle('panel-summary-v1035', tool === 'summary');
        const panelTitle = lifeSection.querySelector('.doll-panel-title-v1035 h3');
        if(tool === 'interact'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '房間互動';
        } else if(tool === 'summary'){
          if(panelTitle) panelTitle.textContent = '今日小人生活摘要';
        }
      }

      setActiveTool(tool);
    }

    window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1038 = showPanel;
    window.__rinzukiDollhouseShowPanelV1036 = showPanel;

    // Clone toolbar to remove previous conflicting scroll/click handlers.
    if(toolbar && !toolbar.dataset.v1038Rebound){
      const cleanToolbar = toolbar.cloneNode(true);
      cleanToolbar.dataset.v1038Rebound = '1';
      toolbar.replaceWith(cleanToolbar);
      cleanToolbar.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        const btn = e.target.closest('[data-tool]');
        if(!btn) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        showPanel(btn.dataset.tool);
      });
    }

    const combined = document.getElementById('dollCombinedPanelV1033');
    let handle = document.getElementById('dollPanelToggleV1033');
    if(combined && handle){
      const newHandle = handle.cloneNode(true);
      handle.replaceWith(newHandle);
      handle = newHandle;

      function syncCollapse(){
        const collapsed = combined.classList.contains('collapsed');
        handle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
        handle.textContent = collapsed ? '場景＋互動' : '收起場景＋互動';
      }

      combined.classList.add('collapsed');
      syncCollapse();

      handle.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        combined.classList.toggle('collapsed');
        syncCollapse();
      });

      combined.querySelectorAll('[data-room-v1030], #dollActionGridV1032 [data-action-v1030]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
          combined.classList.add('collapsed');
          syncCollapse();
          showPanel('interact');
        });
      });
    }

    showPanel('interact');

    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(small) small.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.38';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版修正紙娃娃生活屋分頁切換與場景＋互動摺疊：工具列下方直接顯示分頁內容，不再需要往下滑；摺疊按鈕也恢復可用。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1038TabCollapseProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v1038TabCollapseProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '紙娃娃生活屋分頁與摺疊修正 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.38</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  });
})();
</script>


<style id="v1039-slim-style">
/* v0.10.39: compressed embedded assets, preserve v0.10.38 interactions */
#dollhouse .doll-hero-v1028 h3::after{
  content:"";
}
</style>
<script id="v1039-slim-script">
(function(){
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const hero = document.querySelector('#dollhouse .doll-hero-v1028');
    if(hero){
      const h = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const p = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜瘦身整理版';
      if(p) p.textContent = '這版保留 v0.10.38 已確認可用的生活屋分頁與摺疊動線，先把內嵌圖片素材壓縮瘦身，讓本機 HTML 開啟速度更穩，準備進入 Replit 拆檔。';
    }
    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(small) small.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.39';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版保留紙娃娃生活屋 v0.10.38 穩定互動，並壓縮內嵌圖片素材，作為進 Replit 前的瘦身整理版。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1039SlimProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v1039SlimProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '小世界瘦身整理 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.39</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  });
})();
</script>


<style id="v01039-1-desktop-layout-fix">
/* v0.10.39.1：修正桌面版紙娃娃生活屋被原本雙欄 grid 壓窄 */
#dollhouse .doll-layout-v1028{
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:1fr !important;
  gap:18px !important;
  width:100% !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-v1028,
#dollhouse .doll-card-v1028,
#dollhouse .doll-tab-content-v1038,
#dollhouse .doll-home-v1030,
#dollhouse .doll-life-v1030,
#dollhouse .doll-admin-panel-v1034{
  width:100% !important;
  max-width:100% !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-stage-v1028{
  box-sizing:border-box !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-row-v1034{
  grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-toolbar-btn-v1034{
  min-height:46px !important;
  white-space:normal !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-room-scene-v1031{
  grid-template-columns:minmax(0,0.9fr) minmax(360px,1.1fr) !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-home-grid-v1030{
  grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
}
@media (max-width: 980px){
  #dollhouse .doll-toolbar-row-v1034{
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  }
  #dollhouse .doll-room-scene-v1031,
  #dollhouse .doll-home-grid-v1030{
    grid-template-columns:1fr !important;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 520px){
  #dollhouse .doll-toolbar-row-v1034{
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  }
}
</style>
<script id="v01039-1-desktop-layout-fix-script">
(function(){
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const hero = document.querySelector('#dollhouse .doll-hero-v1028');
    if(hero){
      const h = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const p = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜瘦身整理 × 桌面版排版修正';
      if(p) p.textContent = '這版保留 v0.10.39 的瘦身成果，並修正桌面版被原本雙欄 grid 壓窄的問題，讓生活屋在電腦網頁版恢復正常寬度。';
    }
    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(small) small.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.39.1';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版保留 v0.10.39 瘦身成果，並修正紙娃娃生活屋桌面版被壓成窄欄的排版問題。';
    const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v01039_1DesktopFixProgress')){
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'item';
      item.id = 'v01039_1DesktopFixProgress';
      item.innerHTML = '紙娃娃生活屋桌面排版修正 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.39.1</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  });
})();
</script>


<style id="v01039-2-room-text-above-image">
/* v0.10.39.2：房間互動區文字移到圖片上方 */
#dollhouse .doll-room-scene-v1031{
  grid-template-columns:1fr !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-room-scene-copy-v1031{
  width:100% !important;
}
#dollhouse .doll-room-scene-image-wrap-v1031{
  width:100% !important;
  max-width:760px !important;
  margin:0 auto !important;
}

  width:100% !important;

  #dollhouse .doll-room-scene-copy-v1031 p{

<script id="v01039-2-room-text-above-image-script">
(function(){
  function ready(fn){ if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); else fn(); }
  ready(function(){
    const hero = document.querySelector('#dollhouse .doll-hero-v1028');
    if(hero){
      const h = hero.querySelector('h3');
      const p = hero.querySelector('p');
      if(h) h.textContent = '紙娃娃生活屋｜瘦身整理 × 房間文字上移';

    }
    const small = document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(small) small.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.39.2';
    const profile = document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(profile) profile.textContent = '目前版保留 v0.10.39 瘦身成果，並修正桌面版房間互動文字欄位：文字會顯示在圖片上方，不再被擠成左側窄欄。';

    }
  });
})();
</script>
